description: Create a folder in a workspace. Folders organize items hierarchically.
notes: Use --parent-folder-id for nested folders (omit for root-level). Move items into folders: fabio item move-to-folder --workspace $WS --id $ITEM --folder-id $FOLDER. List items in folder: fabio item list --workspace $WS --folder $FOLDER_ID. Delete requires empty folder (remove children first).

query_examples.description: New folder ID (use with --folder-id on other commands).
